title: NAM Chandrapur Part Time Yoga Teacher/Instructor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: National Ayush Mission Chandrapur (NAM Chandrapur) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 5 Yoga Prashikshak (Part Time) Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Yoga degree/diploma (minimum 2 years) from recognized university/institute
qualification.details: Yoga Prashikshak: Yoga degree/diploma (minimum 2 years) from a recognized university/institute.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NAM Chandrapur Yoga Prashikshak (Part Time) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NAM Chandrapur Yoga Prashikshak recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form is 10th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Yoga Prashikshak post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for the Yoga Prashikshak (Part Time) post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Yoga degree or diploma with a minimum of 2 years duration from a recognized university or institute.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Yoga Prashikshak position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 8000/-.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What are the selection criteria for the Yoga Prashikshak role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a practical demonstration of yoga skills and document verification.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of NAM Chandrapur, as mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number is 2, dated 02-05-2026.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position is for a Part Time Yoga Prashikshak.
